message:
feat(replay): Cx-first Player::play + play_simple (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Expand Cx-first surface into replay.rs. Recording playback has
a per-frame sleep loop — a natural fit for cx threading.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `Player::play_with_cx(cx, sink, control_rx)` — Cx-first
    parallel of `play`. Two cx seams:
      - pre-flight: pre-cancelled cx returns before state
        transitions to Playing.
      - per-frame loop top: cx.checkpoint()? embeds current
        frame_index + timestamp_ms in the cancellation error.
    Inter-frame sleep uses `runtime_compat::sleep_with_cx` so
    cancellation unblocks the sleep immediately rather than
    waiting for the full scaled_delay.

  * `Player::play_simple_with_cx(cx, sink)` — pure delegate
    mirroring the legacy `play_simple` → `play` delegation.

Control-channel interaction: cx cancellation takes precedence
over control signals. Both `check_control` and cx.checkpoint
fire on every loop iteration, so a Stop/Pause control that
arrives during a sleep is still respected — and a cx cancel
that arrives during the same sleep now unblocks immediately
(legacy path would only observe the control after the sleep
finishes).

State management on cancel: mid-playback cancel exits between
frames, leaving `position` at the last-emitted frame index.
Caller can resume by invoking `play_with_cx` on a fresh cx —
the player continues from the existing position.

Regression test (new) `play_simple_with_cx_matches_legacy`:

  * 3-frame recording (Output A, Output B, Marker "done").
  * Drives both `play_simple` (via tick 82's new
    `play_simple_with_cx`) with `PlaybackSpeed::QUAD` (fast —
    avoids slow real-time playback in tests).
  * Asserts:
    - final state == PlayerState::Finished
    - emitted output == b"AB"
    - markers == vec!["done"]

If the Cx-first path dropped a frame, emitted them
out-of-order, or converted the Marker into an Output, the
assertions would fail.

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * replay:: — 203 passed / 0 failed (tick 81: 202 -> tick 82:
    203, +1 new parity test; all legacy replay tests still
    green)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (36.00s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Cx-first replay.rs trail COMPLETE — both public async entry
points on `Player` have Cx-first siblings (`play` ✓ and
`play_simple` ✓).

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
